pages.text: $(italic)AgriCraft$() — less a manual than a logbook. It records the crops you've inspected and the mutations you've turned up, and explains crop-stick breeding as you go. This is where to learn AgriCraft; the Companion otherwise leaves the mod to its own pages.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Writable Book$() + any $(italic)seed$().
pages.title: Agricultural Journal
